MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON AUG-22-2007 IN DEPT. 206, DEFENDANT ROSABEL ALMENDARES' MOTION FOR STAY OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, CONTINUE TRIAL WAS HEARD TODAY. DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR CONTINUANCE OF TRIAL DATE IS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE IS CONTINUED FROM 8/27/07 TO 9/10/07 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR STAY IS CONTINUED FROM AUG-22-2007 TO MASTER CALENDAR MOTION AT SEP-05-2007, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206 RE POSTING OF BOND. JUDGE: A.
